series_metadata.series_description: Investigative background files are used to conduct a background analysis of waste facilities, their ownership, and key employees for the production of an investigative report that the Ohio Attorney General''s Office issues to the Ohio Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) for its use in the issuance or renewal of permits and licenses. Documents can include, but are not limited to, disclosure statements submitted by applicants, investigative notes and work product, supporting documentation, and final investigative report.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 6 years. ; Paper: Retain 6 years, unless scanned and saved electronically., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
